name: Scheduled Task Created
description: Detects creation of new scheduled tasks which may indicate persistence mechanism
query:
// Scheduled Task Creation
// New scheduled tasks for persistence
events from endpoint
where (process_name = "schtasks.exe" and command_line contains "/create")
  or event_type = "scheduled_task_created"
group by hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
